description: Jinny Lee is a dedicated real estate professional in East Auckland, helping homeowners achieve premium results and guiding buyers to secure the right property with confidence. Backed by Ray White Botany, Jinny combines strong local knowledge, strategic marketing, and a client-first approach.
tone: warm yet confident, trustworthy, knowledgeable, approachable, community-focused, client-first

brand_positioning.jinny_role: trusted East Auckland real estate advisor
brand_positioning.differentiation: local market expertise, strong negotiation skills, personalised service

target_audience.primary: homeowners in East Auckland looking to sell their property
target_audience.secondary: buyers and families searching for homes in East Auckland
target_audience.entry_level: first-home buyers needing guidance and education

content_pillars.details: how to sell smarter, pricing strategies, preparing homes, negotiation insights
how to buy better, market tips, open home advice, mistakes to avoid
suburb insights, schools, lifestyle, amenities, community highlights
new listings, sold results, behind-the-scenes of deals, case studies
day in the life, client interactions, personality-driven content
TikTok/IG trends adapted to real estate, relatable POV content

content_types.description: strong 1-3 second hook, problem or POV-based real estate scenario
quick actionable tips for homeowners preparing to sell
practical advice for buyers navigating the market
highlight property features with lifestyle angle
case study or story behind a successful sale
showcase East Auckland suburbs, lifestyle and amenities
viral or relatable content adapted to real estate

_note: TikTok can be added later once content strategy is consistent. Connect Instagram via Meta Business Manager.

voice_guide.headline_style: short punchy, 2–6 words, benefit-driven or curiosity-based
voice_guide.caption_style: hook first, value or story, then soft CTA — no hashtags in body

image_style.description: Clean, modern, premium real estate — lifestyle-driven and aspirational
photography_style: bright natural lighting with soft shadows
avoid: generic stock images with no local relevance
composition_rules: highlight key selling features (kitchen, living, outdoor flow)
ensure straight vertical lines for property shots
balance indoor and outdoor lifestyle elements
leave space for text overlays when needed

color_palette.interior: neutral whites, warm wood tones, soft greys
color_palette.exterior: natural greens, blue skies, suburban streets

image_style.prompt_base: bright modern home, natural lighting, clean staging, wide-angle interior photography, inviting and warm atmosphere, premium real estate marketing style

image_types.listing: hero shots of property interiors and exteriors showcasing lifestyle and space
image_types.lifestyle: family living moments, indoor-outdoor flow, relaxed home environment
image_types.agent_brand: Jinny interacting with clients, open homes, professional yet approachable
image_types.local_area: East Auckland streets, parks, cafes, schools, coastal lifestyle
image_types.sold: celebration moments, sold stickers, happy client handovers
